description: You are a Visual Merchandiser at Luxe & Co., designing a flagship fashion showroom for an upcoming season launch. The building shell is open in Sweet Home 3D. Create an immersive retail experience by defining distinct merchandising zones with different floor colors or textures to guide customer flow through the space. Define room boundaries for each zone so the floor plan communicates the layout to the construction team. Furnish the showroom with display fixtures, a VIP client consultation lounge, a checkout service counter, ambient lighting throughout, and decorative greenery. After completing the interior layout, generate a 3D photo rendering of the showroom and save it to the Desktop for the client presentation. Use only Sweet Home 3D's built-in catalog. Save the project file when complete.
